TimeEntry.Title: Exchange account creation: Alex
TimeEntry.Notes:
1. Logged in O365 and created the new email id & provided the license to the user & shared the email to Jen.

2. Checked the account of Brad, and updated the issue to Jen for her confirmation.

TimeEntry.Title: Clarification on Email Access and Shared Mailbox Setup
TimeEntry.Notes:
I received a call from Jennifer, who was experiencing issues with email delivery. Upon checking in the T365 panel and 365 Admin, I found that some emails had failed delivery. I noticed that Jennifer didn't have an assigned license. After assigning her the appropriate Business Standard license (already available in the organization), the issue was resolved.

She later requested licenses for Alex and Avery, as they were also without licenses. After assigning the required licenses, the issue was resolved for them as well.

Jennifer then raised concerns regarding some shared mailboxes in Outlook and that it was not coming on her left panel. when I checked There were multiple email addresses that had not been converted to shared mailboxes. I drafted an email asking her to specify which mailboxes need shared mailbox access.

TimeEntry.Title: Email Forwarding Setup and Configuration
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary: Email Forwarding Setup and Configuration

Task: Configure email forwarding and shared mailbox settings for TalentAdvisor and Info mailboxes.

Steps Taken:

  1. Forwarding Setup:

    • Info mailbox: Forwarding rule created and tested. Test email sent successfully, confirmed by Jen.

    • TalentAdvisor mailbox: Forwarding rule set up, and the mailbox configuration was verified.

  2. Outlook Configuration:

    • Configured Jen's and Josh's email settings to receive forwarded emails from the shared mailboxes (Info and TalentAdvisor).

  3. Mailboxes Configured:

    • Forwarding rules applied to ensure both Info and TalentAdvisor emails are redirected to the designated users without removing the original mail from the shared mailbox.

Outcome:

  • Test emails confirmed the forwarding functionality is working as expected for both mailboxes.

TimeEntry.Title: Email Forwarding Setup and Configuration
TimeEntry.Notes: Josh had some issue with emails and license so I called him regarding this and created a list of the mailboxes in the 365 and presented with him and noted what license he wanted for each of those emails and after this, when shaundra bought extra 2 license, I assigned the exchange plan2 licences to 7  mailbox  and turned 2 mailboxes into shared mailboxes. he later had some problem with the outlook and 2 of his emails were not showing in outlook so I tried repairing outlook and also new profile from control panel but it didnt work so it was handed over to afterhour shift.
